shots.reasoning_brief: Visual-only shot establishing scene with mother and child in foreground; no dialogue or props.
Dialogue from child to mother; visible characters are the pair; no props or music.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 在想予予今天要好好表现。

shots.reasoning_brief: Mother responds to child; same characters; performance note as gaze.
Child's confident reply; duo in frame; no handoffs.
Scene transition to classroom with group; teacher central, children and parents in circle; visual-only.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: EXTRA_TEACHER
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 今天是我们中班的第一天，请小朋友们轮流做自我介绍好不好？先说名字，再说一个关于自己的秘密。

shots.reasoning_brief: Teacher addresses group; focus on teacher; group in background implied.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 大家好，我叫沈知予。小名予予。

shots.reasoning_brief: Child's introduction to class; solo foreground.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 我爸爸是这个城市最厉害的人。但我还没见过他。等我找到他，他会变得很厉害。

dialogue_annotations.speaker: EXTRA_TEACHER
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 予予的爸爸一定很了不起。那你有没有什么爱好呢？

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 我喜欢画画。还有数学。100以内的加减法我都能算。

shots.reasoning_brief: Scene change to evening; mother waiting, child running out; visual-only.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 妈咪，我告诉你一个秘密。

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 我今天在幼儿园走廊上看到一张照片。挂在荣誉墙上。一个穿西装的男人，下面写着'陆氏集团总裁陆景琛先生捐赠'。妈咪——就是医院的那个叔叔！
dialogue_annotations.gaze_rule: 左右看了看，凑到她耳边

shots.reasoning_brief: Child whispers discovery to mother; photo mentioned but no handoff.

shots.reasoning_brief: Phone call from boss to assistant; corrects input error.

music_cues: 吉他轻拨，一丝暖意中带着悬念
shots.reasoning_brief: Visual-only closing shot with music cue; no characters in foreground.
